title: Nonogram - Master's Legacy
description:
The Greatest pack

Classic pack

Speed pack

Об игре Nonograms, also known as Picross or Griddlers, are picture logic puzzles in which cells in a grid must be colored or left blank according to numbers at the side of the grid to reveal a hidden picture. © WikiMaster's Legacy
Excellent attempt in a world of Nonogram/Picross puzzles. Galore of levels, multiple game modes along with level editor & workshop would never disappoint any puzzle fan.Features• Totally free - Starter Pack, Community Levels & Level Editor are available for everybody.

• Gorgeous Starter Pack - perfect 15 Nonogram levels to get you started and tease your brain for more adventure.

• Multiple DLC's with different game modes and level styles.

• Completed all levels? Don't worry! We have an endless list of user-made paintings, you'll never feel lonely.

• You should love to paint, do you? Go on and try our awesome level editor (up to 100x100 size), show those impostors who is the Greatest One here!

• Art design - clean and beautiful.

• Relaxing ambient soundtracks will keep your mind sharp and focused.

Disclaimer - Master's Legacy is free version of The Greatest Painter. Master's Legacy's DLCs contains all puzzles from Nonogram - The Greatest Painter.
description_short: Master's Legacy - discover all beauty of Nonogram puzzles (multiple game modes, level sizes), master painting skills in Editor and share works with friends in Workshop. Become The Greatest.

upsells.name: Nonogram - Master's Legacy, The Greatest Pack
